title: taraxacum ochraceum
intro: Taraxacum ochraceum, also known as the yellow dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion genus that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum ochraceum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
